findings.evidence: Loose uses "staryu" and "starmie" correctly; default uses homophone variants throughout section
Loose has spacing; default has proper compound names
Capitalization variance; default capitalizes acronym correctly

notes_for_main_thread: v7 chunk 00 is clean. Segmentation differences between default and loose are expected (Whisper splits at different boundaries). No duplicates detected. Pokemon names: Starmie/Staryu render as homophones (star me/star you) in default, correct in loose. No hallucinations or splice artifacts found.
